title: esenbeckia pentaphylla subsp. belizensis
intro: Esenbeckia pentaphylla subsp. belizensis, also known as Belie's or Belizean Tree of Life, is a plant species within the Rutaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Esenbeckia pentaphylla subsp. belizensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, colds, and flu.
